name: alloydb-omni
description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB Omni database and data.
author: Google LLC

userConfig.name: ALLOYDB_OMNI_HOST
userConfig.description: (Optional) Host of the AlloyDB Omni instance. localhost by default.

userConfig.name: ALLOYDB_OMNI_PORT
userConfig.description: (Optional) Port of the AlloyDB Omni instance. 5432 by default

userConfig.name: ALLOYDB_OMNI_DATABASE
userConfig.description: Name of the database to be connected to
